g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me starter code for the TUM VI data loader in Python')
sendPrompt('Show me ORB feature detection and matching code with ratio test for monocular VO')
sendPrompt('Show me essential matrix estimation and cheirality disambiguation for monocular VO')
sendPrompt('Show me PnP tracking with RANSAC and optional motion-only bundle adjustment')
sendPrompt('Show me stereo rectification code using TUM VI Kalibr calibration in OpenCV')
sendPrompt('Show me disparity computation with StereoSGBM and depth map generation')
sendPrompt('Show me 3D point cloud construction from disparity using the stereo depth formula')
sendPrompt('Show me 3D-2D PnP pose estimation for stereo VO frame-to-frame tracking')
sendPrompt('Show me TUM format trajectory export code in Python')
sendPrompt('Show me ATE and RPE computation using Sim3 and SE3 alignment for TUM VI evaluation')
sendPrompt('Show me start-end drift error computation for Corridor3 and Outdoors5')
sendPrompt('Show me 3D trajectory comparison plots for monocular vs stereo VO vs ground truth')

g.text: Deliverables — GitHub + TUM trajs + IEEE paper + poster
Forbidden — SuperPoint, SuperGlue, learned depth, pose regression nets

svg.text: Click any box to start coding
